body:
## Problem
The `/compare` hub is handled in `api/meta/[...path].js` (exact match at line 475), but the **6 individual gear comparison pages** at `/compare/<slug>` fall through to the generic fallback.

These are gear brand vs. gear brand comparisons â€” **NOT drummer `/vs/<slug>` comparisons** (those have Article+BreadcrumbList schema from #1189/shipped).

Pages from `api/sitemap.js` `gearComparisons` array (priority 0.8):
- `/compare/tama-vs-pearl`
- `/compare/meinl-vs-zildjian`
- `/compare/tama-iron-cobra-vs-pearl-demon-drive`
- `/compare/paiste-vs-sabian`
- `/compare/tama-slp-vs-pearl-sensitone`
- `/compare/sonor-vs-dw`

**Verified gap:** The handler at line 475 is `if (path === '/compare')` â€” exact match only. No regex for `/compare/<slug>` individual pages.

## Fix
**File:** `api/meta/[...path].js` â€” add before the `path === '/compare'` handler (line 475):

```javascript
// Individual gear comparison pages (tama-vs-pearl, meinl-vs-zildjian, etc.)
const gearCompareMatch = path.match(/^\/compare\/([a-z0-9-]+)$/);
if (gearCompareMatch) {
  const slug = gearCompareMatch[1];
  // 'tama-vs-pearl' -> 'Tama vs Pearl'
  const title = slug
    .split('-vs-')
    .map(p => p.split('-').map(w => w.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + w.slice(1)).join(' '))
    .join(' vs ');
  return {
    title: `${title} â€” Drum Gear Comparison | ${SITE_NAME}`,
    description: `Compare ${title} for metal drumming: specs, pro endorsements, price points, and which metal legends use each. Side-by-side gear breakdown.`,
    image: DEFAULT_IMAGE,
    type: 'article',
    url: `${BASE_URL}/compare/${slug}`,
    breadcrumbSchema: [
      { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
      { name: 'Compare', url: `${BASE_URL}/compare` },
      { name: title, url: `${BASE_URL}/compare/${slug}` },
    ],
  };
}
```

## Estimated organic uplift
Enables keyword-matched snippets for high-intent purchase-comparison queries: "Tama vs Pearl drums", "Meinl vs Zildjian cymbals for metal", "Paiste vs Sabian metal". Buyer-journey queries with affiliate conversion potential. BreadcrumbList adds visual breadcrumb in SERP.

## Verify
1. `curl -s -A 'Googlebot' 'https://metalforge.io/api/meta/compare/tama-vs-pearl'` â†’ title "Tama vs Pearl â€” Drum Gear Comparison"
2. `curl -s -A 'Googlebot' 'https://metalforge.io/api/meta/compare/meinl-vs-zildjian'` â†’ title "Meinl vs Zildjian"
3. BreadcrumbList JSON-LD present in response
4. `/compare` hub still matches the existing exact handler (no regression)
5. No generic fallback on any `/compare/<slug>` page

## Done
All 6 `/compare/<slug>` pages return keyword-matched meta + BreadcrumbList from `api/meta/[...path].js`.
title: SEO batch: /compare/<slug> gear comparison pages missing SSR meta + BreadcrumbList (~6 pages)
